title: A Littlewood-Paley description of modelled distributions
abstract: We exhibit a fundamental link between Hairer's theory of regularity structures and the paracontrolled calculus of Gubinelli, Imkeller and Perkowski. By using paraproducts we provide a Littlewood-Paley description of the spaces of modelled distributions in regularity structures that is similar to the Besov description of classical Hölder spaces.
